allow: Bash(curl -s "http://localhost:8123/" --data-binary "SELECT count\(\) as rows, countDistinct\(event_name\) as distinct_events, min\(timestamp\) as earliest, max\(timestamp\) as latest FROM argus.events FORMAT PrettyCompact")
Bash(curl -s "http://localhost:8123/" --data-binary "SELECT event_name, count\(\) as cnt FROM argus.events GROUP BY event_name ORDER BY event_name FORMAT PrettyCompact")
